name: Endive-Radicchio Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the curly endive by removing stems and tearing into small pieces.
Prepare the radicchio by shredding it.
Prepare the Belgian endive by julienning it.
2. Combine all the prepared greens with sesame seeds in a large bowl and toss well, setting aside.
3. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients (white wine vinegar, honey, soy sauce) and blend thoroughly.
4. Pour the dressing over the greens mixture and serve immediately or refrigerate, tightly covered, for a few hours.
